race.comment: OLIVIA TWIST (8) has failed to beat a runner home in her two runs this prep, but she hasn't been beaten all that far. Found her three rivals too sharp last start over 1100m at Gosford. This maiden isn't as tough and an extra 200m is ideal at this stage of the prep. Can take care of this field. NO NO YES (6) raced handy but failed to quicken in heavy going first-up over 1200m at Nowra. In the market that day so he must be pleasing them at home. Can turn things around with the blinkers going on today. MILITARY LEGEND (11) raced wide without cover and understandably dropped out last start at Canterbury. Fitter for two runs back from a spell and will find this far easier so watch for a much better performance. FABRES (5) can improve second-up with blinkers back on.
